reviews.review_description:
For everybody interested in visiting the 2nd Temple during the time of Jesus Christ, this App is the best software you can hope for.

The software is not restricted to exploring the Temple. You can go down to the Pool of Siloa and take the processional road up to the Hulda Gates.

Would be great, if the developpers added more details to the Palace of Pontius Pilate, the Antonina and Golgatha.

I really enjoyed the educational experience and learned a few interesting facts just within a few short minutes from turning on the game. I think it's a great concept.          - Dad

"I really liked this one! My brother suggested I climb the chain ALL the way up. When I made it all the way up, I let go and the fall down was really fun. Getting lost wasn't that great but it was still really fun. I loved being able to walk freely and to explore."                               - 12 year old daughter

"The tour played peaceful music and you get to see certain places. It's both fun and educational!"                    - 10 year old son

"It was so fun!"          - 8 year old daughter

Pretty impressive renderings and experience overall. I could really feel the grandeur of being there - or what I think being there would have felt like. Educational and entertaining. I've enjoyed having folks over to explore this and other VR tours with me.

reviews.review_title: Seeing is Believing – How Amazing It Is
reviews.review_description: From my swivel chair, I explored for hours and still felt like I had only scratched the surface. Hundreds of floating scrolls provide background information and explanations, making the experience both fascinating and educational.
It is very impressive to see the hugh size of Herodes temple and you can learn a lot
It is a great experience to see the temple. Very impressive

This is quite awful. Bugs and glitches everywhere. Some of the rooms look unfinished, in others the framerate drops to a stutter. Terrible voice acting for NPC guides who all look the same. This was made in the most amateurish way, but it's being sold for a steep price.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share candid feedback. We’re sorry this was your experience — that’s not the standard we aim for.

Immersive History is a small team building historically grounded VR experiences, and while many users value the educational depth, we recognize that performance, polish, and presentation must meet expectations as well. We’re actively improving framerate stability, environment completeness, and NPC presentation with each release.

Your feedback is heard and helps inform where we focus our efforts next. If you’d like to share specific issues or reach us directly, we’re always open to listening.

Thank you for helping us improve.

reviews.review_title: So much exploration, so much detail
reviews.review_description: this 3d model is amazing, so many rooms, so much detail, and there are hundereds of information scrolls and a tour guide for each room.
